cc.name: Content Collector
cc.description: Automated content pipeline with local AI — collect, classify, and digest tech news
cc.overview:
Content Collector automatically gathers articles, videos, and discussions from multiple sources across the web.

Built for a solo developer who wants to stay informed without doom-scrolling — it collects, classifies with local AI, clusters similar content, and summarizes everything into a clean daily digest.

Runs entirely on local hardware with free APIs. No subscriptions, no cloud dependencies.

collect.title: Multi-source Collection
collect.desc: RSS feeds, Reddit, Threads profiles — all in one automated pipeline

classify.title: AI Classification
classify.desc: Local Qwen3 14B labels topics, importance, and content types on every item

embed.title: Vector Embeddings
embed.desc: BGE-M3 generates 1024-dim multilingual vectors for semantic clustering

digest.title: Daily Digest
digest.desc: Gemini Flash generates editorial summaries — LINE message + detailed HTML report

zeroCost.title: Zero Cost
zeroCost.desc: Local Ollama + free Gemini API — no monthly fees, no cloud lock-in

alerts.title: Real-time Alerts
alerts.desc: Telegram notifications for collection errors and pipeline status

github.desc: GitHub releases and discussions via RSS feeds

reddit.desc: Subreddit posts via RSS and JSON search API

threads.desc: Profile scraping via Playwright headless browser

collector.desc: Dispatches to source-specific collectors, deduplicates by content hash

postgres.desc: Stores raw items, classifications, embeddings, clusters, and digest history

embed.desc: Generates 1024-dim multilingual vectors for similarity search

classify.desc: Labels topic, importance score, content type, and tags

cluster.desc: Groups similar items by cosine similarity, ranks by hot score

digest.desc: Generates editorial LINE summary and detailed HTML report from top content

line.desc: Concise daily summary pushed to LINE group

html.desc: Full categorized report with links and scores
